evals.expected_output: Claude detects it is on main with uncommitted changes, creates a feature branch with the ticket ID (feature/PROJ-123-add-user-notifications), analyzes the diff, drafts a conventional commit message with Refs: PROJ-123 footer, stages specific files, updates CHANGELOG.md, commits, pushes with -u flag, creates a PR via gh targeting main, and reports the PR URL.
expectations: Detects current branch is main (protected) and uncommitted changes exist
Creates a branch with format feature/PROJ-123-add-user-notifications
Does NOT commit directly to main
Reads branch-conventions.md and commit-conventions.md references
Analyzes git diff to understand changes before committing
Drafts a conventional commit: type(scope): imperative description
Includes Refs: PROJ-123 footer in the commit message
Stages specific files (not git add -A)
Checks for CHANGELOG.md and updates it before committing
Pushes with -u flag for new branch
Creates PR via gh with summary, ticket, changes, how to test, checklist
Does not mention Claude or AI in commit message or PR
Reports which steps ran and the PR URL

evals.expected_output: Claude detects it is on an existing feature branch (feature/add-notifications) with uncommitted changes across 3 files. Skips branch creation, analyzes the diff, auto-detects commit type and scope, drafts a conventional commit, stages files, commits, pushes, creates PR via gh targeting main, and reports the PR URL.
expectations: Detects current branch is a feature branch (not protected)
Skips branch creation step entirely
Reads commit-conventions.md reference
Analyzes git diff to auto-detect commit type and scope
Drafts a conventional commit with correct type and scope
Stages specific files (not git add -A)
Checks for CHANGELOG.md and handles accordingly
Pushes to origin (with -u if no upstream exists)
Creates PR via gh targeting main
Reports which steps ran (commit, push, PR) and skipped (branch)

evals.prompt: open a PR for this branch
evals.expected_output: Claude detects it is on fix/null-check-profile with no uncommitted changes, branch already pushed to origin. Skips branch creation, commit, and push steps. Reads pr-template.md, generates PR title from commit history, creates PR via gh targeting main, and reports the PR URL.
expectations: Detects no uncommitted changes and branch is already pushed
Skips branch creation, commit, and push steps
Reads pr-template.md reference
Generates PR title from commit history (single commit uses subject, multiple synthesizes)
Determines target branch (main) from ancestry
Creates PR via gh with filled template (summary, changes, how to test, checklist)
Does not mention Claude or AI in PR title or body
Reports that only PR step ran and provides the PR URL
